name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 71 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 60+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 给 AI 智能体用的上下文运行时，提供文件读取、命令执行、代码搜索和目录浏览能力，并通过多种读取模式和 AST 解析大幅压缩传给大模型的上下文，最高可省 99% token。
